title: 日本ダービーの後に・散華の歓び

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I am defeated—what tragedy! Oh, how I draw out
the best in my opponents! To that effect, the race
was a rousing success.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I have also found an adversary whose intensity
surpasses the Golden Generation's, but she
declines me! It seems running by my side is an
honor too high.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Nevertheless, the winds of time billow my sails!
Even without a worthy foe, the crowds roar for
me. They yearn for the bell to toll and mark the
passing of an era!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
So ring it I shall. The Golden Generation awaits at
the Arima Kinen!
